why: Learn Go from scratch with interactive lessons, quizzes, and hands-on exercises. Build a solid foundation in programming that you can apply to real projects.
successCriteria: Write and run small Go programs from scratch
Understand what a program is, what running code means, and how files become output
Use Go to solve a small real problem as a capstone
constraints: Start from the basics — no prior programming experience required
Track your progress as you go
